violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

The front entrance door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and the kitchen refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Ice machine and kitchen refrigerator must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed around the perimeter of the kitchen. No food products or equipment observed to be contaminated. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Areas of droppings must be properly cleaned in order to observe any new pest activity. Pest control is to be contacted and increased as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of brown/black residue and other debris. Ice machine is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The front door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
